what_went_well: TypeScript build passes with zero errors
Pre-existing test failures confirmed not caused by changes (7 failures existed before)
foundry-retry.sh → cli/retry.ts: full port with list/retry-all/retry-slug modes + task.md guard
foundry-cleanup.sh → cli/cleanup.ts: full port with dry-run/apply/days options + summary.md guard
foundry-stats.sh → enhanced cmdStatus()/cmdList() in foundry.ts with attempt, branch, paths, agent durations
foundry-preflight.sh → pipeline/preflight.ts: task validity, workspace safety, concurrency, policy checks + foundryStopTaskWithReason
foundry-setup.sh → inlined in foundry.ts setup case block
All runBashLib() calls for retry/cleanup/stats/setup replaced with TS functions
improvement_suggestions: The TaskState interface in task-state-v2.ts does not include an 'attempt' field — the bash scripts use it extensively. A follow-up task should add 'attempt?: number' to the TaskState interface to avoid the 'as unknown as Record<string, unknown>' cast workaround.
7 pre-existing test failures exist in actions.test.ts, tasks.test.ts, task-state-v2.test.ts — these are out of scope but should be fixed
deviations_from_spec: cmdStatus() with no args now shows latest task detail (matching foundry-stats.sh default) instead of listing all tasks — the old list-all behaviour is preserved via 'foundry list'
foundry stats with no args now delegates to cmdStatus(['--list']) for tabular output, matching foundry-stats.sh --list mode
